title: zornia lanata
intro: Zornia lanata, also known as hairy zornia or hairy buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Zornia lanata can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
